summary: Iteration 31: Tested httpOnly cookies, booking field filtering, and advanced analytics. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Statistics page shows 'Pokročilá analytika' section with conversion rate, heatmap, trends chart, and top schools table. Fixed bug: PublicBooking response model created to allow stripping institution_id from public booking responses.

issues: GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false was concatenated with ENABLE_HEALTH_CHECK on same line - fixed by adding newline

critical_code_review_comments: httpOnly cookies correctly implemented with Secure, SameSite=Lax flags
Cookie extraction in security.py checks cookie first, then Authorization header - correct dual-mode auth
Refresh endpoint correctly reads from cookie when body is empty
Logout correctly clears both access_token and refresh_token cookies
PublicBooking response model created to properly strip internal fields from public booking responses
Analytics endpoints (heatmap, trends, top-schools, conversion) all return correct data structures
Heatmap uses Czech day labels (Po, Út, St, Čt, Pá, So, Ne) with Monday first
Trends endpoint compares current vs previous year with 12 months of data
WAF still blocks SQL injection attempts (verified with SLEEP(5) test)
ICS feeds still require authentication token
context_for_next_testing_agent: httpOnly cookies, booking field filtering, and advanced analytics all verified working. PublicBooking model added to schemas.py to fix response validation error when stripping internal fields. Frontend Statistics page shows all advanced analytics components correctly.

verified_features.feature: httpOnly Cookie: POST /api/auth/login returns Set-Cookie headers with access_token and refresh_token cookies (httpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax)
httpOnly Cookie: GET /api/auth/verify works using just the cookie (no Authorization header needed)
httpOnly Cookie: POST /api/auth/refresh reads refresh_token from cookie if body is empty
httpOnly Cookie: Frontend login still works (stores both in localStorage and cookies)
Booking Filter: Public booking response does NOT contain assigned_lecturer_id, terms_accepted_at, terms_accepted_text_version, institution_id, notes
Analytics Heatmap: GET /api/statistics/heatmap returns time_blocks array and data array with day-of-week rows (Po,Út,...)
Analytics Trends: GET /api/statistics/trends returns chart_data with 12 months comparing current vs previous year
Analytics Top Schools: GET /api/statistics/top-schools returns schools array with name, bookings, students, teachers
Analytics Conversion: GET /api/statistics/conversion returns total, confirmed, pending, cancelled, conversion_rate
Frontend: Statistics page shows 'Pokročilá analytika' section with conversion card, heatmap, trend chart, top schools table
Frontend: Heatmap displays colored cells based on booking density
Frontend: Trend chart shows bar chart comparing years
Regression: WAF still blocks SQL injection (e.g. ?age=SLEEP(5))
Regression: ICS feeds still require token

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Public booking endpoint returned 500 error due to response validation - institution_id required but stripped
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Created PublicBooking response model in schemas.py that doesn't require institution_id, updated bookings.py to use PublicBooking for public endpoint

bug_fixes_applied.issue: frontend/.env had GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false concatenated with ENABLE_HEALTH_CHECK on same line
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added newline to separate the environment variables
